name: Male Chauvinist Chili
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Hot Italian link sausage, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 small Green pepper, seeded and chopped
2 cans (14-16 oz each) Italian style tomatoes
1 can (16 oz) Garbanzo or kidney beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the bacon pieces until crisp. Remove and drain well.
2. Add the sausage and ground chuck with onions to the skillet and brown over medium heat. Drain and transfer to the crock pot.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the crock pot and stir well.
4. Cover and cook on low setting for 8 to 14 hours, tasting for seasoning as needed.
